allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/zGraund/CreateReAutomated/releases" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="claude-code"}; $r | Select-Object -First 6 | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ tag = $_.tag_name; name = $_.name; date = $_.published_at; assets = \($_.assets | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) -join ', ' } } | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/create-reautomated/version" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="claude-code \(research\)"}; $r | Where-Object { $_.game_versions -contains "1.21.1" } | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ version_number = $_.version_number; loaders = \($_.loaders -join ','\); date = $_.date_published; files = \($_.files | ForEach-Object { $_.filename }\) -join '; ' } } | Format-List } catch { "Modrinth slug 'create-reautomated' not found: " + $_.Exception.Message })
